topics.name: 1. The Preamble
topics.description: Sovereignty, socialist, secular, democratic republic nature, justice, liberty, and equality.

topics.name: 2. Amendment of Constitution
topics.description: Procedure for amendment under Article 368, types of amendments, and significance.

topics.name: 3. Reorganisation of States
topics.description: Integration of princely states, Dhar Commission, JVP Committee, State Reorganisation Act 1956, and evolution of states.

topics.name: 4. Federalism
topics.description: Federal and unitary features, distribution of legislative, administrative, and financial powers.

topics.name: 5. Articles 1 to 4
topics.description: Territorial jurisdiction of India, formation of new states, and alteration of areas, boundaries, or names.

topics.name: 6. Articles 5 to 11 | Citizenship
topics.description: Articles 5-11 of the Constitution, dual citizenship, and the Citizenship Act.

topics.name: 7. Articles 12 to 35 | Fundamental Rights
topics.description: Definition of State, judicial review, equality, freedom, exploitation protection, religion, cultural & educational rights, and writs.

topics.name: Mixed Revision Set
topics.description: Includes urban flooding, space technology (Vikram-1), economic classifications, and naval defense (Project 17A).

topics.name: Physical Geography & Mapping
topics.description: Southernmost points of India, channels (Ten Degree, Six Degree), and physical landmarks.
